title: Починить ложный handoff на привет и сбой возврата в меню
description: Найти, почему сообщение 'привет' иногда ведет в operator handoff вместо стартового меню, и почему после handoff кнопка возврата в главное меню может падать с Failed to send message. Сначала воспроизвести и снять decision/action evidence, потом исправить и перепроверить.
close_reason: Исправлено

design: This gate catches user-facing and privacy regressions early.
acceptance_criteria: Two-browser isolation passes; quick reply sends typed payload; malicious text/label does not execute; disallowed Origin rejected; public errors are masked; web/WS contract tests and security regressions pass.
close_reason: Intermediate web/WS/security gate passed on focused automated proof: website backend go test -count=1 ./... passed, frontend node tests passed 9/9, decision-engine handler/decision/presenter/worker/session focused go tests passed, unsafe frontend sink/static inline handler check had no production JS matches, CheckOrigin always-true pattern check had no matches. Covers two-browser session isolation via session tests, typed quick reply payload, XSS text rendering, Origin rejection/ws-wss selection, public error masking, and web/WS contract regressions. Live Docker/manual browser proof remains for final E2E gates.

close_reason: Intermediate business provider/negative-path gate passed on deterministic automated proof: provider/actions/seed tests passed, processor/worker/http handler tests passed, full decision-engine go test -count=1 ./... passed, provider contract and mock service seed JSON parsed, audit evidence includes provider/source/status/duration_ms, success/not_found/invalid/unavailable cases cover booking/workspace/workspace availability/payment/account/pricing, read-only fixture regression is covered, and representative deterministic happy/failure paths stay under the 3s provider budget. Live Docker/browser/DB E2E remains for full E2E/final gates.

description: Plan refs: sections 9, 10 P0.6/P1/P2, 11, 19. Establish automated test layers: unit, contract, integration, migration, security and E2E harness. CI or local quality command must run core checks and report clear failures. Coverage must include semantic matcher, preprocessing, renderer, decision policy, providers, HTTP/WS/NLP/operator contracts, DB/bootstrap and transactional persistence.

Verified make check-core passed after these changes, targeted handler/worker/session tests passed, runtime legacy scan for ChatID/DevCLIIdentity/chat_id=1/LLM paths is clean, generated Python cache/venv scan is clean, and git diff --check passes. Real pgvector semantic matcher and full E2E remain separate open tasks.

title: [CB-BRD-015] DOM XSS fix and no inline JavaScript
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C20, 8, 9 security regressions, 11, 20. Remove inline onclick and any unsafe HTML assembly for messages/quick replies. Render user, bot and operator text via DOM APIs/textContent/addEventListener. Add length and HTML/quote regression fixtures.
design: Preserve UX while making rendering structurally safe.
acceptance_criteria: No inline onclick exists in quick replies; malicious user text and quick reply labels render as text and do not execute; security test/Playwright fixture passes; no generated frontend code introduces unsafe innerHTML for dynamic content.
close_reason: Implemented DOM XSS hardening: chat and operator dynamic rendering use DOM APIs/textContent/addEventListener, production frontend JS has no innerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML/outerHTML/onclick/data-quick-reply sinks, malicious user/bot/operator/quick-reply/operator-context fixtures render as text, node frontend test suite passes 9/9, rg static sink check has no matches, and git diff --check passes

title: [CB-BRD-016] Origin allowlist and WSS-aware transport
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C19, 5.7, 8, 11, 20. Replace CheckOrigin always true with env allowlist. Make frontend choose wss under HTTPS and ws under HTTP. Document reverse proxy/TLS story and reject unknown origins with safe error/log shape.
design: Security default should be closed enough for demo/prod-like environment, with explicit dev origins.
acceptance_criteria: Allowed origin connects, disallowed origin rejected; browser test verifies wss under HTTPS base; no CheckOrigin always true in runtime; config and deployment docs explain allowlist and WSS readiness.
close_reason: Origin allowlist enforced, disallowed origins rejected with safe 403/logging, and frontend ws/wss selection verified by focused tests.

title: [CB-BRD-018] Transactional persistence for messages, decisions, actions and transitions
description: Plan refs: sections 1.1, 5.10, 6.5-6.6, 7.7.2, 10 P1.3, 11. Make message processing transactional: inbound message, preprocess/embedding decision, decision log/candidates, action logs, transition log, session context update and outbound bot/operator message. If a mandatory write fails, return controlled error rather than continuing without history.
design: History/state persistence is a BRD requirement, not optional telemetry.
acceptance_criteria: For each user message the DB contains user message, decision log, candidates when applicable, action log when applicable, transition log when mode changes, context update and outbound message; failure path is controlled; integration tests assert transaction boundaries.
close_reason: Implemented transactional message-processing persistence UoW with decision logs/candidates, action audit logs, session context+transition update, mandatory outbound bot message, rollback tests, sqlc generate, and go test ./... verification for decision-engine

title: [CB-BRD-011] Escalation action and fallback-to-operator policy
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C12/C14/C15, 5.3, 7.7.7, 10 P0.5, 11. Implement real request_operator/escalate_to_operator behavior. Manual operator request, repeated low confidence, complaint and provider failure can create handoff. Move session mode to waiting_operator and emit handoff events. First unknown asks clarification; repeated unknown offers/queues operator according to policy.
design: No fmt.Println TODO action remains. Preserve bot silence rules for later operator_connected mode.
acceptance_criteria: Manual operator and repeated fallback create/offer handoff with correct reason; complaint routes to operator; provider unavailable can trigger controlled fallback/operator offer; queue item and transition logs are written; integration tests pass.
close_reason: Implemented real escalate_to_operator behavior and fallback-to-operator policy: manual requests, complaints, repeated low confidence, and provider unavailable queue operator handoff with persisted reasons, session transition/context, action audit, worker tests, and go test ./... verification

title: [CB-BRD-012] Operator API and UI for same-session handoff
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C16, 5.3, 7.4, 10 P1.7, 11, 15.3, 16.2. Build operator queue API/UI: demo operator selection/login, waiting queue, session detail/history, context panel, accept, reply, close, status filters. Operator messages must be stored as sender_type=operator and delivered to user chat in same session. While operator_connected, bot must not auto-answer.
design: Operator UI is operational, not marketing. Context panel includes active_topic, last_intent, confidence, fallback_count and action summaries.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can accept one waiting session, reply into user chat, see later user messages, close handoff and notify user; bot is silent during operator_connected; E2E operator accept/reply/close flows pass with DB assertions.
close_reason: Implemented same-session operator API/UI handoff: decision-engine operator DTO/context fields, operator message persistence as sender_type=operator, operator_connected bot silence, website same-origin operator proxy, compact operator console with demo login/filters/history/context/accept/reply/close, WS handoff/operator message delivery, JSON contract validation, go test ./... for decision-engine and website backend, frontend node tests, and git diff --check

title: [CB-BRD-010] Operator queue schema and lifecycle repositories
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C14-C16, 5.3, 6.2, 7.4, 10 P0.5, 11, 15.3. Add operator_queue, operator_assignments/events and demo operators. Support queue, accept, close, statuses waiting/accepted/closed, reasons manual_request, low_confidence_repeated, complaint, business_error, and context snapshot.
design: Queue is part of same persisted session and must cooperate with mode FSM.
acceptance_criteria: Handoff item can be queued, accepted and closed; status and assignment rows are persisted; context snapshot includes last messages, active topic, last intent and action summaries; integration tests cover lifecycle and constraints.
close_reason: Implemented atomic operator queue lifecycle schema/repositories/service with queue/accept/close, assignments/events, context snapshots, session FSM transition in same Postgres transaction, sqlc generation, and go test ./... verification

title: [CB-BRD-007] Persistent context model and mode FSM
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C06/C07/C12/C13, 5.3, 6.2-6.6, 10, 11. Store mode, active_topic, last_intent, fallback_count, operator_status, metadata and version. Implement limited BRD mode FSM: standard, waiting_operator, operator_connected, closed. Keep topic separate from mode. Support topic switch reset rules and restart restoration.
design: Do not mix domain topics into state enum. Replace stale transitions.json if it conflicts with target FSM.
acceptance_criteria: Context updates persist transactionally; restart restores mode/topic/fallback_count; mode transitions are logged; topic switch resets stale flow; repeated low-confidence uses fallback_count; tests cover standard->waiting_operator->operator_connected->closed and restart restore.
close_reason: Implemented persistent context model and mode FSM

title: [CB-BRD-004] Fresh pgvector schema, migrations and repositories
description: Plan refs: sections 6.0-6.6, 10 P0.4, 11. Build greenfield database model for BRD: pgcrypto, vector, users, operators, sessions, session_context, messages, message_events, intents, intent_examples, knowledge_articles/chunks, quick_replies, decision_logs/candidates, demo data tables, operator_queue/assignments/events, actions_log, transitions_log. Add constraints, FK, active session uniqueness, session version increments and vector indexes.
design: One final target schema. Old init migration may be replaced because compatibility with old DB/runtime is not required.
acceptance_criteria: Empty DB initializes successfully; pgcrypto/vector extensions exist; all target tables, FK, indexes and constraints exist; sqlc/repositories cover required writes/reads; migration/bootstrap tests pass; no legacy backfill assumptions or chat_id=1 compatibility fields are required as source of truth.
close_reason: Implemented and verified fresh pgvector schema/repository layer: added vector catalog migration, session_context/message_events/intents/intent_examples/knowledge_articles/knowledge_chunks/quick_replies/decision_candidates/demo data tables, audit/message extensions, HNSW/GiN/unique indexes, FK/constraint coverage, sqlc brd_catalog queries/generated code, and static schema tests. Verified sqlc generate, go test -count=1 ./internal/infrastructure/repository/postgres, full decision-engine go test -count=1 ./..., git diff --check, and live empty-DB goose migration on one-shot pgvector/pgvector:pg16 container; psql confirmed pgcrypto+vector, 22 target tables, and 5 key indexes.

title: [CB-BRD-005] Semantic intent matcher with pgvector thresholds
description: Plan refs: sections 3.1, 3.5, 6.2, 7.7.2, 10 P0.4, 11. Implement SemanticIntentMatcher over seeded intent_examples and pgvector. Return top-k candidates, confidence, ambiguity delta, selected intent or low-confidence result. Include threshold policy defaults match >= 0.78 and ambiguity delta >= 0.08 until tuned. Rule-based fallback is allowed only for exact commands and NLP outage smoke behavior.
design: Postgres owns vector search; Go owns selection policy. Keep rule-based logic as fallback, not main intelligence.
acceptance_criteria: Seeded examples produce deterministic intents with confidence; low confidence and ambiguous matches trigger fallback policy; pgvector search integration tests pass; exact command intents work; semantic FAQ/business examples map to catalog; matcher records top candidates for decision_logs.
close_reason: Implemented and verified SemanticIntentMatcher over pgvector intent examples: exact system/operator commands bypass NLP outages, semantic matching returns top-k candidates with confidence and ambiguity policy defaults 0.78/0.08, low-confidence/ambiguous/embedding-outage fallbacks preserve diagnostics, semantic seeds populate intents/intent_examples/knowledge chunks, and decision persistence records candidates. Verified go test -count=1 ./... in services/decision-engine, make check-core, git diff --check, and live pgvector/pgvector:pg16 migration + PGVECTOR_TEST_DATABASE_URL go test for SearchIntentExamples.

title: [CB-BRD-006] Session identity and multi-user isolation
description: Plan refs: sections 2 BRD-C04, 5.1, 7.1, 8, 10 P0.3, 11, 15.1. Remove production chat_id=1 behavior. Add channel, external_user_id/client_id and session_id handshake. Website must create/resume a browser session, /decide or /messages must require identity/session, and active session uniqueness must prevent user state/history mixing.
design: Use cookie/browser-generated client id for demo web. Keep any dev CLI default explicit and excluded from production/demo path.
acceptance_criteria: Two browser clients have different session_id, histories, active_topic and state; no production web/decision path defaults to chat_id=1; session API returns resumed flag; integration and E2E isolation tests pass.
notes: Implemented /sessions handshake and strict /decide identity for website/demo path. Added focused Go regression coverage for resumed session flag, two browser clients with different session_id/history/active_topic/state, and rejection of production requests without identity. Full browser E2E harness remains covered by existing downstream Beads chat-bot-523.21 and chat-bot-523.31; no duplicate follow-up created.
close_reason: Implemented session identity and multi-user isolation

title: BRD adaptation: complete deterministic support service
description: Source: docs/development-plan-from-brd.md. design: Use docs/development-plan-from-brd.md as source of truth. Build package by package: contracts/schema, seeds/mock services, NLP/search, decision core, client chat, operator workflow, E2E/ops/docs. Keep product runnable after every package and use gate tasks for intermediate verification.
acceptance_criteria: Done only when final acceptance from sections 1.1, 1.2, 19 and 20 is satisfied: docker compose boots from empty DB, seeds load, no runtime /llm/decide/Ollama/GigaChat path, semantic matching uses pgvector, all BRD business categories work, operator handoff works in same session, restart restores history/context, security regressions pass, E2E-001..E2E-038 pass, diagrams and README match actual contracts, and final cleanup checklist has no legacy/conflicting artifacts.
close_reason: Completed BRD deterministic support service: all child implementation and gate tasks are closed; final acceptance verified compose bootstrap/readiness, pgvector semantic catalog, no active LLM runtime, web chat/business lookup/operator handoff/restart/security flows, full E2E-001..E2E-038, docs/diagrams, cleanup hygiene, and make check-core.

title: [CB-BRD-001] BRD intent catalog, responses and quick replies
description: Plan refs: sections 2, 10 P0.1, 11, 13. Translate all BRD categories and use cases into concrete intent catalog entries, response keys, resolution_type, examples, quick replies and category coverage. Include system, booking, workspace, payment, tech/account, services/rules/location/FAQ, complaint/operator and fallback intents. Each intent from section 13 must have examples, response_key, resolution_type, quick replies where applicable, and planned E2E coverage.
design: Prefer seed-backed catalog in seeds/intents.json and normalized response/quick reply source of truth. Do not keep stale rules/transitions as competing catalog.
acceptance_criteria: All BRD categories are mapped to intents/responses/quick replies; every section 13 intent has at least 8 Russian examples, one positive unit/validation case, response key or resolver path, and category E2E mapping; startup validation catches missing response/knowledge/action keys and placeholder mismatches.
close_reason: Added BRD seed catalog in seeds/intents.json, wired startup validation for response/action/knowledge/placeholder integrity, and passed go test ./internal/app/... ./internal/transport/http/handler ./internal/domain/intent

title: [CB-BRD-002] Replace LLM runtime with DecisionService
description: Plan refs: sections 3.1, 3.3, 3.4, 5.5, 10 P0.2, 11, 20. Remove generative LLM from production/demo message processing. Replace message_worker LLM call with DecisionService pipeline: load session, save inbound message, preprocess/embed/match via injectable interfaces, apply policy, resolve response/actions, persist logs/outbound message. /decide must work with fake semantic matcher before real NLP is ready.
design: Go decision-engine owns business decision. Python NLP only performs preprocessing/embedding, not intent/state/action selection.
acceptance_criteria: Production/demo /decide no longer calls /llm/decide or llmClient.Decide; no Ollama/GigaChat env is needed for runtime; fake matcher integration test proves /decide path; rg checks show no production path to LLM client; legacy LLM code is removed from runtime or moved to legacy/tools and excluded from compose/E2E.
close_reason: Replaced /api/v1/messages runtime with deterministic DecisionService; go test ./internal/app/decision ./internal/app ./internal/transport/http/handler passes, TestMessageUsesDeterministicDecisionServiceWithoutLLM passes, and rg shows no llmClient.Decide or /llm/decide in internal/app or internal/transport/http.

title: Resolve duplicate normalized request_operator seed example

title: Добавить команду полного сброса диалога и сессии
description: Нужна служебная команда, которая удаляет выбранную сессию/диалог и все связанные хвосты так, чтобы тестирование можно было начать заново как будто диалога не было. Контекст от Владислава Коваленко, 12.05.2026 11:15: ручное удаление сессии напрямую из БД привело к зависанию; нужна безопасная команда для случаев, когда бот/диалог залагал в ошибку.
design: Реализовать сброс через доменный сервис/репозиторный API, а не через ad-hoc SQL. Сделать операцию идемпотентной: повторный вызов не должен ломать состояние. Перед удалением определить все таблицы/хранилища, которые участвуют в жизненном цикле сессии, и чистить их в одной понятной транзакционной процедуре или компенсируемом сценарии.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Есть явная команда/админ-действие для полного сброса текущего или указанного диалога/сессии. 2. Сброс удаляет или корректно инвалидирует все связанные данные: session state, pending jobs/locks, сообщения/контекст, временные хвосты и зависимости, которые могут удерживать диалог в зависшем состоянии. 3. После сброса пользователь может начать диалог заново без зависаний и без обращения к ручному удалению в БД. 4. Команда защищена от случайного использования: доступна только разрешенным ролям/окружению и логирует факт сброса. 5. Покрыты тесты на полный сброс, повторный старт диалога и отсутствие оставшихся зависимых записей/локов.
notes: Исходный запрос: 'Я хочу комманду что бы удалить сессию и все ее хвосты... когда я просто залез в бд удалил сесиию все зависло... что бы я мог тестить если он залагал в ошибку... обнулить диалог как будто и небыло'.
close_reason: Implemented protected admin dialog reset endpoint and local reset script. Reset now goes through a domain service/repository path, writes session_reset_audit with deleted-tail counts, deletes the session transactionally so cascades remove messages, decisions, transitions, actions, operator queue/events and session_context, and is idempotent for missing sessions. Verified focused handler/postgres/config/app tests and sh -n reset script; full go test ./... is blocked by discovered seed duplicate tracked as chat-bot-872.

title: Make repeated operator handoff requests idempotent
description: User-visible bug: the chat can show 'Ошибка: Не удалось обработать сообщение. Попробуйте позже.' when the user presses a request_operator quick reply after an operator handoff was already queued. Investigate and fix the root cause across website websocket, decision-engine operator queue, and session transition boundaries. Acceptance: repeated request_operator from the same active session returns/keeps the existing waiting handoff without a public processing_failed error, and tests cover the repeat-click flow.
close_reason: Fixed repeated request_operator handoff by reusing an existing open queue item; added unit and smoke E2E coverage; verified WebSocket repeat-click path and 14/14 smoke E2E.

title: Restore embedding_unavailable evidence in isolated E2E-033 runtime
description: Discovered from chat-bot-uqa.9 during isolated runtime verification on 2026-05-11. In a clean compose project with dedicated ports, E2E-033 now returns a controlled clarify response when nlp-service is stopped, but the decision evidence still lacks embedding_unavailable and instead records ordinary semantic candidates. This means the user-facing fallback is correct while runtime outage evidence is still masked. Need to make isolated E2E-033 prove both: controlled fallback text and decision candidate/fallback_reason evidence that the NLP embedder was unavailable. Preserve the current 204/207 semantic gate and do not regress existing low-confidence behavior.
close_reason: Isolated E2E-033 runtime now builds and proves embedding_unavailable in persisted fallback_reason and candidate evidence; dedicated isolated run passed.

title: Clarify policy for mixed-domain ambiguous semantic queries
description: Discovered from chat-bot-p02 after semantic-gate tuning raised the corpus to 204/207 top1 but left two honest ambiguity failures. Current residual cases: ambiguous.price.services_vs_workspace ("сколько стоит место и услуга") routes to ask_workspace_prices instead of clarify, and ambiguous.code.account_vs_tech ("код не приходит") routes to code_not_received instead of clarify. Need a scalable ambiguity policy that detects mixed-domain intent competition (services vs workspace, account vs tech_issue) and prefers clarify when multiple domains remain materially plausible, without regressing strong single-domain matches or the E2E-033 controlled fallback behavior.
close_reason: Semantic residuals resolved: mixed-domain ambiguous queries now clarify, booking-missing phrasing resolves consistently, and semantic-gate is 207/207 top1 with 207/207 clarify/operator accuracy.

title: UQA failure cluster triage from semantic-gate
description: Discovered from chat-bot-uqa.10 after current semantic-gate shows 41 corpus failures despite green check-core. Need cluster-by-cluster triage of remaining failures (payment, tech_issue, fallback and other low-confidence cases), convert each real defect or missing examples/policy gap into concrete fixes with updated corpus metrics, and keep the release gate honest instead of accepting baseline-only green. Evidence on 2026-05-11: go run ./cmd/semantic-gate => top1 172/207, top3 179/207, clarify 201/207, operator 204/207, failures 41. This task is for failure decomposition and execution, not for closing the epic by proxy.
close_reason: Semantic failure cluster triaged and reduced from 41 to 3 remaining honest misses, with residual ambiguity/not-found work split into chat-bot-qkd and chat-bot-li7.

title: Iterative tuning loop and closure criteria
description: Организовать итеративное улучшение движка до измеримо хорошего состояния, а не одноразовый рефактор. Нужен цикл: baseline -> изменение -> corpus metrics -> failure triage -> data/algorithm fix -> повтор.
design: Завести quality thresholds как код: минимальные top1/top3/clarify/escalation показатели по корпусу и per-domain budgets. Каждый новый failure превращается либо в corpus case, либо в Beads task discovered-from эпика.
acceptance_criteria: Эпик имеет финальный release gate: все дочерние задачи закрыты, corpus thresholds green, full smoke green или явно зафиксированный real-runtime blocker, нет незаведенных follow-up хвостов, bd notes содержат итоговые метрики и команды проверки.
close_reason: Final iterative tuning/release gate completed. Quality thresholds are codified in semantic_quality_test.go, semantic-gate is green at top1 204/207, top3 204/207, clarify 204/207, operator 207/207, bd dep cycles is green, full e2e matrix passes 44/44 on the chat-bot-e2e compose stack, and there are no open follow-up tasks inside the UQA chain. Residual known corpus failures are 3 explicitly visible gate cases and still above release thresholds.

title: Full semantic test matrix and docker smoke coverage
description: Собрать тестовую матрицу, которая реально защищает мощность движка: Go unit/integration, Python nlp-service contract, seed/search pgvector, corpus-gate, website/e2e smoke и негативные сценарии внешних сервисов.
design: Тесты должны быть быстрыми в fake режиме и иметь отдельный opt-in профиль для реального Qwen. Не считать mock proof равным real runtime proof; в Beads фиксировать какие проверки были mock-only, а какие поднимали docker-compose/Qwen.
acceptance_criteria: Makefile/scripts имеют одну команду для quick semantic gate и одну для full docker smoke; CI/local docs описывают prerequisites; matrix покрывает success, clarify, operator escalation, provider failures, dimension mismatch, seed idempotency и context follow-ups.
close_reason: Full semantic test matrix and docker smoke coverage green. Verified repo-level core gate via ./scripts/check-core.sh, targeted smoke subset including E2E-003/005/009/009b/009c/033/035/038/039, and full matrix via E2E_SKIP_COMPOSE=1 E2E_MOCK_EXTERNAL_PORT=18190 E2E_MOCK_EXTERNAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18190 npm run test:e2e:full with 44/44 passed. Also optimized decision-engine Dockerfile layer order so goose install caches before source copy, reducing repeat e2e rebuild cost.

title: Hybrid scorer and rerank policy for decision matcher
description: Усилить SemanticIntentMatcher: сделать явную модель объединения exact, lexical fuzzy, vector semantic, active_topic/context, candidate category и optional rerank top-N. Текущий merge добавляет фиксированный boost 0.08 и не имеет полноценной explainable scoring policy.
design: Скоринг должен быть explainable: каждый candidate хранит component scores и matched_sources. Exact/system commands остаются deterministic bypass. Semantic top-K расширить до rerank pool; Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B оставить feature-flag optional, если corpus-gate покажет пользу.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests покрывают exact precedence, semantic-only, lexical-only, hybrid agreement, hybrid disagreement, ambiguous delta, low confidence, active_topic boost, disallowed intents filtering и deterministic ordering; decision candidates сохраняют explainable metadata; corpus-gate показывает улучшение или неухудшение baseline.
close_reason: Implemented explainable hybrid matcher policy. Replaced fixed max+0.08 merge with weighted semantic+lexical agreement policy, added score_components/matched_sources metadata, added identifier-aware lexical boost for lookup phrases, switched quick semantic gate to an in-process hybrid harness (deterministic local embeddings plus in-memory semantic search) so corpus metrics exercise hybrid ranking without external services, and added deterministic ordering / identifier boost tests. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS with top1 151/207 (up from 148/207 after data pass and from 91/207 original baseline), top3 176/207, clarify 200/207, operator 203/207; git diff --check PASS.

title: Contextual dialogue semantics and slot follow-ups
description: Доделать диалоговую семантику: пользователь часто отвечает коротко после вопроса движка ('да', 'нет', 'завтра', 'по телефону', 'BRG-...', 'а сколько стоит?'). Нужно корректно использовать active_topic, last_intent, fallback_count, mode и ожидаемый slot вместо полной повторной классификации каждого сообщения.
design: Ввести явный слой contextual resolver перед/после matcher: expected identifier, confirmation, negative response, return_to_menu, operator request, follow-up within topic. Не превращать это в набор хрупких if по всем фразам; покрыть через таблицы намерений/слотов и corpus.
acceptance_criteria: Тесты покрывают follow-up identifiers, yes/no, topic continuation, topic switch, repeated fallback, operator handoff, reset/return menu; short utterances не ломают root menu; context promotion не продвигает чужой topic.
close_reason: Implemented contextual dialogue semantics in decision service: identifier-only follow-ups for pending business lookups, yes/no handling for pending states, short active-topic follow-ups via contextual signal tables, and guard so confident global topic switches still win. Added unit tests for identifier follow-up, workspace price follow-up, payment status follow-up, yes/no pending responses, and topic switch preservation. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS with top1 152/207, top3 174/207, clarify 201/207, operator 203/207.

title: Expand intent examples and semantic seed dataset
description: Расширить seeds/intents.json и semantic catalog так, чтобы движок учился на достаточном числе реальных формулировок, а не на узком наборе примеров. Особенно важны бытовые перефразировки, short utterances, ошибки, синонимы и доменные hard negatives между booking/workspace/payment/account.
design: Добавлять примеры как данные, не как ad hoc правила. Сохранять явные intent_key/category/response_key/action контракты. Для конфликтных формулировок использовать weights/metadata и покрывать expected ambiguity/clarify в corpus, а не принудительно угадывать.
acceptance_criteria: Каждый production intent имеет репрезентативные examples; есть tests на уникальность normalized_text в рамках intent/locale; corpus показывает улучшение baseline; конфликтные примеры документированы через expected clarify или category context.
close_reason: Expanded intent examples and semantic seed dataset using corpus failure evidence, especially system phrases, workspace/payment/account/services бытовые variants, and FAQ-specific examples that stop competing with generic booking/cancellation intents. Added uniqueness regression test for normalized examples within each intent. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/seed ./internal/app/decision PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS with top1 148/207 (up from 91/207), top3 170/207 (up from 166/207), clarify 199/207, operator 203/207.

title: Qwen3 embedding provider in nlp-service
description: Добавить реальный embedding provider для nlp-service на Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B с сохранением fake/unavailable режимов для быстрых unit/contract тестов. Provider должен поддерживать одиночный и batch embed, instruction-aware query prompt и нормализованные векторы.
design: Настройки: embedding_mode=fake|unavailable|qwen3, embedding_model_id, embedding_device, embedding_dimension, query_instruction. Для Qwen использовать sentence-transformers/transformers совместимо с актуальной model card; не смешивать решающую бизнес-логику в nlp-service, сервис возвращает только embedding/preprocess metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Contract tests проходят в fake режиме; Qwen provider имеет unit tests с замоканным model backend; ready показывает model/dimension/provider; пустые/слишком большие запросы отклоняются; batch сохраняет порядок; есть documented local command для ручной проверки Qwen.
close_reason: Реализовано и проверено

title: Qwen-compatible pgvector dimension and seed migration
description: Сейчас semantic catalog использует vector(384), а Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B поддерживает до 1024 измерений. Нужно принять и реализовать целевую размерность без скрытого mismatch между nlp-service, decision-engine config, migrations и seed.
design: Предпочтение: 1024 как полноценный output Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B, если локальные ресурсы приемлемы; если выбирается 384 через MRL/custom dimensions, решение должно быть явно записано в design/Beads. Любой вариант должен иметь миграцию, конфиги docker-compose, default config, validation и integration test на dimension mismatch.
acceptance_criteria: Новая миграция не ломает существующий каталог; NLP_EXPECTED_DIMENSION, nlp-service embedding_dimension и pgvector columns согласованы; seed fails loudly on wrong dimension; integration test проверяет successful seed/search и negative mismatch case.
notes: 2026-05-11 decision: keep semantic catalog on 384 dimensions for now and use Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B custom-dimension output instead of 1024. Reason: current pgvector catalog, fake quick tests, and compose demo already operate on 384; this bead makes that choice explicit and guarded instead of implicit. Added DB semantic_catalog_settings embedding_dimension=384, explicit repo seed/search dimension validation, and runtime readiness check that compares NLP expected dimension with DB setting.
close_reason: Реализовано и проверено

title: Semantic gold corpus and quality baseline
description: Создать измеримый baseline для распознавания интентов до изменения алгоритмов. Нужен corpus, который фиксирует реальные пользовательские формулировки для всех доменов: booking, workspace, payment, account, services, complaint, tech_issue, operator, system, fallback. Покрыть перефразирование, опечатки, короткие реплики, смешение русского/английского, негативные примеры, hard negatives и амбивалентные запросы.
design: Добавить машинно-читаемый corpus в decision-engine testdata и runner, который прогоняет текущий matcher/service без внешних сервисов. Метрики: top1 intent accuracy, top3 contains expected, expected clarify for ambiguous/unknown, expected operator escalation, context-sensitive accuracy by active_topic.
acceptance_criteria: Есть corpus минимум с 150 кейсами и покрытием всех активных интентов; runner выводит JSON/табличные метрики; текущий baseline зафиксирован в тесте без искусственного ослабления ожиданий; failures показывают конкретный кейс, expected, actual, candidates и reason.
close_reason: Реализовано и проверено

title: Migrate deterministic responses from options to quick_replies
description: Перевести deterministic CTA в services/decision-engine/configs/responses.json с legacy options на explicit quick_replies. Не трогать truly open-ended textual recovery варианты, пока не будет отдельного product decision. Acceptance: ключевые product ветки payment/tech/account/services/complaint/other не используют options для deterministic routing.
close_reason: Deterministic response CTA are explicit quick_replies now; presenter and HTTP layers no longer synthesize hidden routing from legacy options. Verified by presenter/handler tests, make check-core, and full e2e matrix 45/45.

title: Migrate seeds intent quick replies to explicit intents
description: Перевести remaining deterministic quick replies в seeds/intents.json с send_text на select_intent/request_operator, добавить недостающие intent definitions и knowledge keys where needed. Acceptance: deterministic CTA в intent catalog не зависят от text-only routing.
close_reason: Seed intent quick replies and examples were normalized to the final explicit-intent catalog; duplicate normalized examples were removed and the dataset/check-core gates now pass.

title: Убрать legacy option-routing и довести dialog product до final explicit intent architecture
description: Эпик: полностью убрать зависимость продуктовых CTA от legacy options/send_text compatibility routing. Все deterministic переходы в responses.json и seeds/intents.json должны стать explicit quick_replies с select_intent/request_operator. Semantic matcher должен остаться только для freeform. После миграции presenter не должен содержать context-aware legacy routing как рабочую продуктовую опору. Нужны тесты и live verification по ключевым flows.
close_reason: Legacy option-routing removal and final explicit intent architecture are complete. Verified with make semantic-gate, make check-core, isolated E2E-033, and full e2e matrix 45/45.

title: Remove presenter legacy compatibility routing after migration
description: После миграции responses/intents удалить или резко сузить legacy option routing из presenter. Архитектурная цель: freeform intent matching живет в decision layer, а UI CTA routed explicitly via quick_replies. Acceptance: presenter does not act as hidden product routing engine for deterministic flows.
close_reason: Deterministic response CTA are explicit quick_replies now; presenter and HTTP layers no longer synthesize hidden routing from legacy options. Verified by presenter/handler tests, make check-core, and full e2e matrix 45/45.

title: Epic: production-grade semantic decision engine
description: Довести decision-engine и nlp-service до законченного мощного семантического движка: хорошее распознавание интентов, устойчивость к перефразированию/опечаткам/контексту, Qwen embedding runtime, измеримый quality gate и широкий регрессионный корпус. Текущий код уже имеет exact + lexical fuzzy + semantic pgvector, но nlp-service сейчас fake/unavailable, pgvector схема зафиксирована на vector(384), а покрытие не является полноценным quality gate для продукта.
design: Основной embedding-кандидат по актуальным источникам: Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B. Это минимальная модель серии Qwen3 Embedding: 0.6B параметров, 32K контекст, embedding dimension до 1024 с MRL/custom dimensions, instruction-aware, Apache-2.0. Планировать Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B как опциональный второй этап для rerank top-N, если corpus-gate покажет пользу.
acceptance_criteria: Эпик закрывается только когда: есть gold corpus по всем доменам и негативным сценариям; есть автоматический semantic quality gate с порогами top-1/top-3/clarify/escalation; nlp-service умеет реальный Qwen3 embedding и сохраняет fake режим для быстрых тестов; decision-engine корректно объединяет exact/lexical/semantic/context/rerank сигналы; все изменения покрыты unit, contract, integration и smoke/e2e проверками; итоговые метрики и команды проверки записаны в Beads.
close_reason: Completed production-grade semantic decision engine epic. Closed beads uqa.1 through uqa.10 with corpus gate, Qwen provider, 384-dim pgvector compatibility, data expansion, explainable hybrid scoring, contextual follow-ups, knowledge retrieval enrichment, observability cleanup, and full test matrix/smoke proof. Final evidence: semantic-gate 204/207 top1 and top3, 204/207 clarify, 207/207 operator; bd dep cycles green; npm run test:e2e:full on chat-bot-e2e stack passed 44/44; check-core green. Remaining known corpus exceptions were explicitly dispositioned and do not block release thresholds.

title: Гибридный semantic+fuzzy matcher для freeform запросов

Также расширить intent catalog более бытовыми фразами без дублирования неоднозначных exact примеров между разными intent'ами.

title: Pricing phrases route to operator instead of service pricing flow
description:
## Why
User pricing questions like "какая цена услуг?" and "цены на услуги?" are being routed into operator handoff instead of the deterministic services/pricing flow shown in the product demo intent catalog.

## What needs to be done
- reproduce the exact phrases from the web chat
- identify whether the failure is in semantic matching, seeded intents/examples, or quick reply/runtime routing
- fix the root cause
- add regression coverage for pricing phrases and neighboring service phrases
- verify runtime behavior remains on the pricing/services path and does not enqueue operator handoff

## Evidence
User screenshots on 2026-05-11 show pricing phrases receiving operator handoff text rather than service pricing answers.
acceptance_criteria: Pricing phrases map to the intended services/pricing flow; tests cover the regression; runtime no longer hands pricing questions to operator by default.
close_reason: Completed and verified

title: Operator-connected chat rejects user messages and return-to-menu with generic internal error
description:
## Why
After the bot connects an operator, further user messages and the "Вернуться в главное меню" action can produce the generic public error "Не удалось обработать сообщение. Попробуйте позже." This indicates operator-mode routing/action handling is incomplete or inconsistent.

## What needs to be done
- reproduce the operator handoff sequence from the web chat screenshots
- identify the failing backend/frontend boundary for user messages and return-to-menu while the session is waiting/connected to operator

title: Resolve booking_not_found corpus contract without identifier
description: Discovered from chat-bot-p02 after semantic-gate tuning reached 204/207 top1. Today the engine answers with clarify_request, which is operationally safer but does not satisfy the corpus expectation. Need to decide the honest contract: either introduce a supported negative booking-missing path without an ID, or update the corpus expectation to clarify_request / ask_booking_status if booking_not_found is impossible without lookup evidence.
close_reason: Semantic residuals resolved: mixed-domain ambiguous queries now clarify, booking-missing phrasing resolves consistently, and semantic-gate is 207/207 top1 with 207/207 clarify/operator accuracy.

title: Decision observability and candidate contract cleanup
description: Сделать решения движка объяснимыми и устранить contract drift. Уже видно несоответствие: CandidateSourceLexicalFuzzy существует в коде, но CHECK source в decision_candidates перечисляет intent_example/knowledge_chunk/exact_command/fallback без lexical_fuzzy.
design: Каждое решение должно сохранять top candidates, source/components, thresholds, fallback_reason, model/version/dimension и context signals. Контракты API/DB/DTO должны принимать все реальные candidate sources или явно маппить их.
acceptance_criteria: DB enum/check и Go constants согласованы; tests ловят unsupported candidate source; decision logs содержат thresholds/model metadata; operator/debug surface может показать почему выбрали/не выбрали intent без утечки PII.
close_reason: Aligned decision observability and candidate contracts. Persisted decision fallback_reason and threshold into decision_logs, added runtime validation for candidate source values, aligned DB CHECK to accept lexical_fuzzy alongside intent_example/knowledge_chunk/exact_command/fallback, and added schema/persistence regression coverage. Also restored repeated low-confidence root escalation so worker-level decision persistence gates remain green. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision ./internal/app/worker ./internal/app ./internal/infrastructure/repository/postgres PASS; git diff --check PASS.

title: Knowledge retrieval path for answer-grade semantic responses
description: В базе уже есть knowledge_articles/knowledge_chunks и seed embedding, но основной decision flow должен явно использовать semantic retrieval для knowledge/static_response сценариев там, где нужен содержательный ответ, а не только intent selection.
design: Разделить intent classification и knowledge retrieval: intent выбирает сценарий/response contract, knowledge search подбирает релевантный article/chunk внутри категории. Ответ должен оставаться контролируемым через presenter/response catalog, без генеративного произвола.
acceptance_criteria: Repository search для knowledge chunks покрыт tests; service выбирает релевантный knowledge candidate при knowledge intents; low-confidence retrieval не подменяет intent; candidates/decision logs показывают article_key/chunk confidence; e2e smoke покрывает минимум 3 knowledge домена.
close_reason: Implemented knowledge retrieval enrichment path for knowledge intents. DecisionService now performs post-classification knowledge retrieval, attaches selected knowledge_chunk candidate metadata (article_key, chunk_index, title, knowledge_key) without overriding intent selection, and run wiring initializes the retriever from the existing embedder + semantic catalog repository. Added repository wrapper for knowledge chunk search, service-level retrieval tests, and fixed goose migration annotations for semantic catalog dimension guard. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision ./internal/app ./internal/infrastructure/repository/postgres PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS; targeted e2e smoke subset PASS with E2E-003, E2E-005, E2E-009, E2E-009b, E2E-009c, E2E-038 via E2E_MOCK_EXTERNAL_PORT=18190 E2E_KEEP_COMPOSE=1 npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --grep 'E2E-003|E2E-005|E2E-009|E2E-038'.
